title: isolepis cernua var. cernua
intro: Isolepis cernua var. cernua, also known as the drooping club-rush, is a plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and as a diuretic. The health benefits of Isolepis cernua var. cernua include alleviating coughs and colds, reducing inflammation, and promoting kidney function. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions of the roots or rhizomes, which can be consumed as teas or added to other remedies.
